items.name: foundation-chat
items.title: Foundation Chat
items.description: A production-ready AI Gateway chat shell for Next.js, AI SDK 6, AI Elements, and shadcn/ui.
items.docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item depends on official shadcn registry primitives plus AI Elements conversation and message, writes the route files into the consumer app directory, and adds AI Gateway env vars to .env.local.

items.name: rag-chatbot
items.title: RAG Chatbot
items.description: A grounded document support chatbot with preindexed PDF ingestion, pgvector retrieval, and visible tool traces.
items.docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item adds the demo page, chat and indexing routes, client workspace components, pgvector-backed retrieval logic, and the AI Gateway plus DATABASE_URL env vars required for indexing and grounded chat.

items.name: multimodal-chatbot
items.title: Multimodal Chatbot
items.description: An AI Gateway chat workspace for ad-hoc image and PDF questions with inline file parts.
items.docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item adds the multimodal demo page, chat route, client workspace, and AI Gateway env vars required for image and PDF chat.

items.name: object-generation
items.title: Object Generation
items.description: A structured-output review workspace that streams a generated object directly inside the assistant message.
items.docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item adds the object-generation demo page, streaming review routes, client workspace, and AI Gateway env vars required for structured output over text, image, and PDF inputs.

items.name: customer-memory-agent
items.title: Memory & Persistence Agent
items.description: A database-backed support workspace with persistent threads, explicit saved memories, retrieval, and compaction checkpoints.
items.docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item adds the customer-memory demo page, session and thread routes, visitor-scoped persistence, saved-memory retrieval, compaction checkpoints, and the Postgres plus AI Gateway env vars required for end-to-end chat. The database must support pgvector.

items.name: streaming-chat-shell
items.title: Streaming Chat Shell
items.description: A developer-facing chat workspace with a shared chat session and replayable SSE trace.
items.docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item adds the demo page, chat route, replayable SSE events route, feature-local chat workspace, and AI Gateway env vars required for shared useChat and developer replay traces.

items.name: loop-agent
items.title: Loop Agent
items.description: A support triage agent with parallel context gathering, SLA reasoning, and human approval.
items.docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item adds the loop-agent page, chat route, approval-aware chat workspace, support triage tools, and AI Gateway env vars required for the bounded tool loop.

items.name: trace-eval-agent
items.title: Trace Eval Agent
items.description: A live research chat that surfaces execution trace, deterministic eval checks, and an LLM judge over the same run.
items.docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item adds the demo page, research chat route, deterministic eval route, streamed judge route, client workspace, and AI Gateway env vars required for live search plus trace and eval inspection.

items.name: persistent-agent
items.title: Persistent Agent
items.description: An addressable chat resource that persists conversation state in Postgres and reconnects in-flight streams through Redis.
items.docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item adds the persistent chat pages, route-backed streaming APIs, visitor cookie contract, Postgres-backed chat storage, Redis resumable stream support, and the AI Gateway plus DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL env vars required for refresh-safe chat state.

items.name: sandbox-agent
items.title: Sandbox Agent
items.description: A sandbox-backed prototype builder that gives each chat a persistent Vercel Sandbox and a live preview tab.
items.docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item adds the sandbox-agent page, node runtime chat route, preview health route, client workspace, sandbox session registry, bash-backed tool surface, and the AI Gateway plus Vercel Sandbox env vars required for persistent previewable chat sessions.

items.name: mcp-agent
items.title: MCP Agent
items.description: An MCP-backed workspace that inspects installed project docs and optional local Next.js runtime state through AI SDK MCP clients.
items.docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item adds the MCP agent page, chat route, built-in project-docs MCP route, client workspace, local project-docs discovery, and the AI Gateway env vars required for MCP-backed chat. The optional Next.js runtime MCP server becomes available after next-devtools-mcp can attach to a running Next.js dev server.
